heading: Public information and education on recycling and reuse of wastewater, use of land treatment, and reduction of wastewater volume
label: 1294 Public information and education on recycling and reuse of wastewater, use of land treatment, and reduction of wastewater volume
text: The Administrator shall develop and operate within one year of , a continuing program of public information and education on recycling and reuse of wastewater (including sludge), the use of land treatment, and methods for the reduction of wastewater volume.December 27, 1977
